title: Redesign UI to differentiate ConnectSphere from Instagram's visual style

requirements.text: Redesign the StoriesStrip component to replace circular avatar bubbles (Instagram-style) with a horizontal card strip using rectangular or pill-shaped story cards that display the user's name below a square/rounded-rectangle thumbnail with a distinct colored border indicator for unseen stories.

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Stories strip no longer uses circular avatar-only bubbles
Story cards are rectangular or pill-shaped with a visible thumbnail area
Unseen stories use a distinct non-ring indicator (e.g., gradient left border or glow badge)
Username is visible on each story card without requiring a tap

requirements.text: Redesign the PostCard component to move away from the Instagram-style card layout. Use a content-first layout: place the post text/image prominently at the top, move the author info (avatar, display name, username, timestamp) into a compact inline row below the content, and replace the three-dot overflow menu with an inline icon row for actions. The like and comment counts should be displayed as pill badges rather than plain text counters.

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Post image or text content appears before the author row
Author info is in a compact single row beneath the content
Like and comment counts are styled as pill/badge elements
Action buttons use a distinct layout not resembling Instagram's bottom icon row

requirements.text: Redesign the ProfilePage to replace the Instagram-style 3-column post grid and top stats row. Use a masonry or 2-column asymmetric grid for posts, and display follower/following stats as large typographic counters in a horizontal band with labels beneath them rather than as small inline numbers. The edit profile button should be a full-width outlined button styled with the app's gradient theme.

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Post grid is masonry or 2-column asymmetric layout instead of a uniform 3-column grid
Follower/following stats are displayed as large typographic counters with labels
Edit profile button spans full width and uses gradient styling
Overall profile layout is visually distinct from Instagram's profile page

requirements.text: Redesign the BottomNav to use a floating pill-shaped navigation bar instead of a full-width flat tab bar. The nav should float above the bottom edge with a shadow and backdrop blur effect. The active tab indicator should be a filled background highlight within the pill rather than an underline or icon color change. The Create Post button should be an elevated square icon button within the pill.

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation renders as a floating pill/capsule shape, not a full-width bar
Nav bar has visible drop shadow and backdrop blur
Active tab shows a filled highlight background rather than an underline
Create Post button is distinctly styled as an elevated square within the pill

requirements.text: Redesign the HomePage feed layout so it does not resemble Instagram's feed. Use a card-based feed with visible card background panels (using the app's glass/gradient card style) and left-accented colored borders per post type (text vs. image). Add a visual divider between the stories strip and the feed. Remove any full-bleed edge-to-edge image layout that mimics Instagram.

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Feed cards have a visible panel background, not a plain white/dark flat card
Images in posts are contained within rounded card boundaries, not full-bleed
A clear visual section divider separates stories from the post feed
Feed does not resemble Instagram's continuous scroll image feed

requirements.text: Redesign the LandingPage hero section to use an angled split layout or asymmetric two-panel design rather than a centered hero. The left/top panel should show the app logo and tagline; the right/bottom panel should show a stylized feature showcase or gradient graphic element. Replace any generic rounded CTA button with a distinctive styled button using the app's gradient and a unique shape (e.g., chamfered corners or arrow suffix).

quotes: change some parts of app which is looking similar to ig and give it diffrent look

acceptanceCriteria: Landing page uses an asymmetric or split-panel layout, not a single centered column
CTA button is visually distinct from a standard rounded rectangle
App logo and tagline are in one visual zone, feature highlights in another
Overall landing page does not resemble generic social-media app landing pages

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Preserve all existing functionality — only visual/layout changes are in scope
Maintain dark mode compatibility for all redesigned components
Keep mobile-first responsive layout; max-width mobile shell must remain
nonGoals: Adding new backend features or changing data models
Changing the purple-blue gradient color theme (only layout and structural UI patterns change)
Altering authentication flows or profile setup logic
